Floral Ice Cream is a soft sage floral pants set inspired by delicate  pastel blooms and effortless summer elegance. Light, airy, and quietly feminine.

 

DESCRIPTION:

Floral Ice Cream is a two-piece floral pants set featuring a relaxed button-down blouse and fluid wide-leg trousers.

The soft sage green base is decorated with romantic pastel blossoms in blush, ivory, and muted rose tones — creating a fresh, almost “melting” floral effect across the silhouette.

The blouse features a soft V neckline with a minimal collar and long flowing sleeves. The cut is relaxed, allowing natural drape and movement.

The trousers fall into a straight wide-leg silhouette, designed for comfort and balance. The elastic waistband ensures ease while maintaining a clean line.

This set blends softness with structure — sweet but refined.

 

DETAILS:

• Two-piece floral pants set
• Relaxed button-down blouse
• Soft V neckline
• Long sleeves
• Wide-leg trousers
• Elastic waistband
• All-over pastel botanical print
• Limited production

HOW TO WEAR:

• Wear as a full coordinated set
• Pair the blouse with tailored white trousers
• Style the pants with a neutral fitted top
• Add minimal sandals for soft day styling
• Layer with a light cardigan or blazer
